ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the university is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the university */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university offering the program */,
  "discipline" TEXT /* Discipline or field of study for the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree type offered by the program */,
  "fee_usd" INTEGER /* Annual fee in USD for the program */,
  "duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in months */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the program */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "curriculum_overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the curriculum */,
  "language_of_instruction" TEXT /* Language used for instruction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program being ranked */,
  "ranking_system" TEXT /* Name of the ranking system */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank assigned to the program by the ranking system */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "score" REAL /* Numerical score assigned by the ranking system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, save, compare) */,
  "access_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_access_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "update_details" TEXT /* Details of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_updates_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
